seoTitle: Moonaree vs Moonta Bay — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Moonaree and Moonta Bay. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Moonaree vs Moonta Bay: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Moonaree and Moonta Bay.
heading: Moonaree vs Moonta Bay — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Moonaree, South Australia and Moonta Bay, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Moonta Bay has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Moonaree (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Moonaree or Moonta Bay safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Moonaree has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Moonta Bay scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Moonaree scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. Moonta Bay scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Moonaree or Moonta Bay?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Moonta Bay has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
